title: Unakkum Enakkum Lyrics Amma Kanakku Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Amma Kanakku Unakkum Enakkum Song Lyrics
Singers : Ramya NSK, Vandhana Srinivasan
Lyrics : Ilaiyaraaja

ingu aezhai kaanum
kanavu
adhu noottril ondru
nadakkum.
adhai nambi nambi thaney
nam naatkal ingu
pogum.

kadandhu pogum vazhigal
pala pudhirgal sollum
adhu kodukkum paadam
unnai vazhi nadaththi
sellum.

kanavae kanavae
ellorkkum annai nee
anbaal anaikkum
azhagaana kanni nee.

kuzhandhai pola manadhai
naam paadhukaakka vendum
orr kurai illaadhu valarndhaal
ooor pottri pugala vendum..(2)

ullukkulle urudhi vendum
kayyil eduthadhellaam
naam mudikka vendum

kuzhandhai pola manadhai
naam paadhukaakka vendum
orr kurai illaadhu valarndhaal
oor pottri pugala vendum..(2)

ullukkulle urudhi vendum
kayyil eduthadhellaam
naam mudikka vendum

manadhaal madhiyaal
nee selva magaladi
gunaththaal unarvaal
endrum uyarndha pennadi

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Unakkum Enakkum'?

The song 'Unakkum Enakkum' conveys the deep emotional connection and understanding between loved ones, emphasizing the importance of relationships.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie 'Amma Kanakku'?

In Amma Kanakku, the song reflects the nurturing bond between a mother and her child, highlighting the values of love and support.

Who are the singers of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Ramya NSK and Vandhana Srinivasan.

Who composed the music for 'Unakkum Enakkum'?

The music for 'Unakkum Enakkum' was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

When was 'Unakkum Enakkum' released?

'Unakkum Enakkum' was released on June 9, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the song 'Unakkum Enakkum' from the movie Amma Kanakku, the lyrics beautifully express the bond between a mother and her child, evoking feelings of love and nostalgia. The uplifting melody, crafted by Ilaiyaraaja, enhances the emotional depth of the song, making it a heartfelt tribute to familial relationships. As Ramya NSK and Vandhana Srinivasan's voices intertwine, listeners are taken on a journey of warmth and connection. This song resonates with anyone who cherishes the bonds of love and support in their lives.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Unakkum Enakkum from Amma Kanakku is a delightful melody that beautifully captures the essence of familial bonds. With the enchanting voices of Ramya NSK and Vandhana Srinivasan, paired with Ilaiyaraaja's timeless composition, this song resonates with joy and nostalgia. Dive into this musical journey that celebrates love and connection, making it a must-listen for all music lovers!
stanzaMeanings: What dreams you and I have, those will happen until we feel them.
Here, we see a beautiful dream that will happen in a hundred years. Believing in it, our days will pass here.
There are many paths that will go through, and they will guide you with lessons.
Oh dream, oh dream, you are a mother to everyone, and you are a beautiful girl who embraces with love.
Like a child, we need to nurture our hearts without any shortcomings, and we should celebrate our village.
We need to have determination inside, and we must complete everything we take in our hands.
Like a child, we need to nurture our hearts without any shortcomings, and we should celebrate our village.
We need to have determination inside, and we must complete everything we take in our hands.
With a heart full of wisdom, you will rise, oh daughter, with your qualities, you will always be a great woman.
